invalid_land_size: Please enter a valid land size
login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
registration_failed: Failed to complete profile. Please try again.
new_user_hint: You will be directed to complete your data if you are a new user
register_plan_hint: Share your plan to avoid market oversupply
no_notes: No notes available for this crop
confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this plan?
confirm_harvest: Are you sure you want to mark this plan as harvested?
harvest_not_ready: Harvesting is only allowed within 14 days of the expected harvest date.
plant_crop_desc: It's time to start planting {crop} as per your plan.
predictions_desc: Advanced AI models to predict market trends and crop yields.
assistant_desc: Smart agricultural advisor trained on your farm data and local market trends.
crop_yield_prediction: Crop yield forecasting based on historical data and weather patterns.
voice_mode_desc: Talk to your assistant naturally using STT and TTS technology.
image_analysis_desc: Upload photos of crops to detect diseases and get treatment advice.
delete_task_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
harvest_date_after_planting: Harvest date must be after planting date
prediction_error: Failed to get prediction. Please try again.
profit_prediction_desc: Estimate your potential earnings based on market trends and costs.
yield_prediction_desc: Predict your total harvest volume based on historical data.
price_prediction_desc: Stay ahead by knowing the future market prices of your crops.
disease_prediction_desc: Get alerts on potential disease risks in your governorate.
demand_prediction_desc: Understand future demand levels to optimize your planting choices.
profit_model_detail: This model uses advanced AI to analyze historical price trends, transportation costs, and market demand in Jordan. It provides you with a data-driven estimate of your expected net profit for a specific crop cycle.
yield_model_detail: Using historical yield data from the Ministry of Agriculture and real-time weather forecasts, this model estimates the total tons you are likely to harvest per donum.
price_model_detail: Predicts future retail and wholesale prices for agricultural products, helping you decide the best time to harvest and sell.
disease_model_detail: Analyzes weather patterns (humidity and temperature) to predict the likelihood of common agricultural diseases in your specific region.
demand_model_detail: Forecasts the consumption needs of the local market to help you avoid oversupply and maximize your return on investment.
